race.comment: LADY LILAC (10) reappeared with a very close third of twenty one runners at the Curragh (1600m) three weeks ago. Cheekpieces applied and definitely among the leading hopes. There could be more to come this season for COLLECTING COIN (6). Didn't get the breaks initially when fifth over 1400m at Naas last month. Capable of improvement. UM WADI (16) is yet to be given many chances racing for his top stable. Sticking on late last time and will find this return to 1600m favourable. Respect. Unexposed runner HELLORHIGHWATER (7) and Gowran Park winner RION RUBETTE (5) are others open to consideration in a competitive contest.
